title: DEKTON Impulse Sprinkler | Adjustable Full/Partial Circle Coverage | Heavy-Duty Metal Base | Up to 85 Feet Range | Water-Saving Design | Ideal for Lawn & Garden Irrigation | Durable & Rust-Resistant
features: Adjustable Coverage Control: The Dekton Impulse Sprinkler offers customizable watering with adjustable full or partial circle coverage, allowing you to target specific areas or provide 360° irrigation for your lawn or garden.

Long Range & Efficient Watering: With a spray range of up to 85 feet in diameter, this sprinkler delivers efficient water coverage for large outdoor areas, ensuring your lawn and plants get the hydration they need without wasting water.

Heavy-Duty Metal Base: Built with a sturdy, durable metal base, the Dekton Impulse Sprinkler remains stable during operation, ensuring consistent and even water distribution while resisting tipping or movement.

Water-Saving Design: Designed with precision in mind, the sprinkler minimizes water waste by allowing you to control the direction and spray distance, making it eco-friendly and cost-effective for any garden.

Rust-Resistant & Durable Construction: Crafted from high-quality materials, the sprinkler's rust-resistant components ensure long-lasting performance and reliability, even after frequent use and exposure to the elements.
description: The Dekton Impulse Sprinkler offers superior irrigation performance with its adjustable full or partial circle coverage, making it an ideal choice for efficiently watering your lawn, garden, or any outdoor space. Designed to reach up to 85 feet in diameter, it ensures maximum water coverage for even the largest areas, saving you time and effort. With its customizable spray settings, you can easily direct the water where it’s needed most, whether you want to cover a specific section or go full circle. Constructed with a heavy-duty metal base, this sprinkler stays stable on the ground, providing consistent watering without the risk of tipping over. The durable design, combined with rust-resistant components, ensures that the Dekton Impulse Sprinkler will perform reliably season after season. Its water-saving design allows for precise control over spray distance and direction, reducing water waste and helping you maintain a lush, green lawn or thriving garden in an eco-friendly and cost-efficient way. Whether you're watering plants, grass, or landscaping, this impulse sprinkler provides optimal hydration while withstanding the elements.
